text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Diamond Stakes, and a fan
approaches us outside the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the reporter in the round glasses we met at
the academy. He praises Tannhauser's optimism
and tells her that her words saved him.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the support of many different people
pushing her forward, it's time to challenge the
Diamond Stakes!
